title: Just Better ChainMail
description: Chainmail now gives protection from arrows like in the real world
body:
Every armor has its purpose... except chainmail

**not with this mod!**![Chainmail collection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a96e6b3b1323f09b44bb7c4da798766db465f5a.png)

Now you are able to craft _chainmail_ and _copper chainmail_ armor

And they give you immunity to arrows, cacti, and pointed dripstone!!!!![arrow immunity showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff9344df788e0aa5865474c00938d1ef864914f6.gif)
